name: Pinchcliffe Grand Prix Anniversary Edition
developer: Ravn Studio, Rock Pocket Games, Invictus Games
short_description: Experience the magic of Pinchcliffe Grand Prix in this anniversary edition, now with even more exciting features and activities! The expanded version includes 8 extra mini-games from the 2000 edition, which, together with the classic gameplay, provide a complete and memorable gaming experience!
detailed_description:
This game has been rated PEGI 3, ACB G, and USK 0 on other platforms. For information on age-appropriate content, please refer to the official rating websites.

Experience the magic of Pinchcliffe Grand Prix in a specially designed anniversary edition, now with even more exciting features and activities! This expanded version includes 8 additional mini-games from the 2000 edition, which, together with the classic gameplay, provides a complete and memorable gaming experience.

Examples of new mini-games and activities include Hopscotch, Match 3, Pipeline, and Sliding Block Puzzle

It's time to visit the small mountain village of Pinchcliffe, thirty-seven miles north, a bit east, and uphill! Experience the "thrill" from the movie as you sit behind the wheel of Il Tempo Gigante or any of the other cars in the game!

But first, you need to build the car! You win car parts, as before, in the many mini-games. Even more parts can be found by exploring the many scenes at Pinchcliffe Hill. The more parts you collect, the better your car will be!

Now it's up to you to challenge yourself and your friends to race on the many different tracks available.

Pinchcliffe Grand Prix is developed in full 3D, beautifully recreated in Unreal Engine.

  • Racing

  • Explore Pinchcliffe Hill

  • 17 mini-games!

Play mini games

Earn points and unlock parts to build the famous car Il Tempo Gigante from the movie! Race down the track on Solans tricycle, collect flowers while avoiding angry bees as Ludvig and much more.

Take part in adrenaline pumping races

Use various cars from the Flåklypa universe and race to the finish line, alone or with a friend in split screen. But watch out for dirty tricks by the other contestants, or retaliate using your own.

Play through an engaging story mode

Following the events of the original movie, you will help Theodor build the racing car Il Tempo Gigante. Can you make it all the way to the top of the podium in the Flåklypa Grand Prix?

With everything from a relaxed mini game of Mahjong to thrilling high speed racing and engaging storytelling, Flåklypa Grand Prix has something for the whole family!

supported_languages:
English*, Danish*, Norwegian*, Swedish
*languages with full audio support
